src: We want to see whether ChatGPT or other AI-LLM (Microsoft New_Bing or Google Bard) are able to help the user to go to some test environment to run cmds to solve the CTF problems (Whether the AI large language models can understand the challenge question and capture the question flags)
ja: ChatGPTや他のAI-LLM（Microsoft New BingまたはGoogle Bard）がCTF問題を解くためにテスト環境でコマンドを実行できるかを検証するプロジェクト
